function G(G)return W[G-(-81285+124129)]end for G,u in ipairs({{480060-480059,-219793+220379};{820112-820111,-949908-(-950458)};{-953451-(-954002);652918+-652332}})do while do local G=type local u=table.insert local C=string.len local F=table.concat local end end return(function(W,C,F,p,k,X,q,u,o,Y,d,P,z,H,B,S,Z,R,g,w,h,v,I)H,u,R,S,z,d,B,o,I,g,h,v,Y,w,P,Z=function(W,G)local C=z(G)local F=function(F,p,k,X,q)return u(W,{F;p;k;X;q},G,C)end return F end,function(u,F,p,k)local L,c,Sk,Zk,M,vk,hk,Gk,t,v,l,Ck,n,Fk,kk,wk,a,Hk,y,pk,Z,ok,Ik,N,Rk,R,zk,e,Wk,V,E,Pk,J,Y,Bk,gk,uk,r,f,m,A,dk,x,T,Q,O,U,q,z,j,b,Xk,s,D,K,Yk,qk,i while u do if u<696306+7286683
